Current Affairs

95 solved questions in this topic · SSC GD General Knowledge & General Awareness

Home
Q.No 30 Current AffairsEnglish
in which year did India take over the BRICS Chairship from Russia?
A
2020
B
2021
✓ Correct
C
2022
D
2023

Solution

Correct answer: B. India assumed the BRICS Chairship in 2021, hosting the 13th BRICS Summit virtually that year.

A is incorrect: In 2020 Russia held the BRICS Chair.

C is incorrect: China chaired BRICS in 2022.

D is incorrect: South Africa chaired BRICS in 2023.

💡 BRICS originally stood for Brazil, Russia, India, China and South Africa; it expanded with new members from 2024.
Q.No 30 Current AffairsHindi
वर्ष 207 में चाबहार बंदरगाह के माध्यम से भारत द्वारा पहली बार अफगानिस्तान को कौन सी वस्तु भेजी गई थी?
A
चावल
B
गेहूँ
✓ Correct
C
तेल
D
मशीनरी

Solution

Correct answer: B. In 2017, India shipped its first consignment of wheat to Afghanistan through Iran's Chabahar Port, demonstrating the port's value as a route bypassing Pakistan.

A is incorrect: Rice was not the commodity of this landmark first shipment.

C is incorrect: Oil was not the cargo; Chabahar gives India access to Afghanistan/Central Asia.

D is incorrect: Machinery was not the first consignment sent.

💡 Chabahar Port lies on Iran's south-eastern coast and is developed with Indian assistance to reach Afghanistan and Central Asia.
Q.No 32 Current AffairsHindi
हाल ही में किस सांसद को इतिहास और स्कॉलरशिप में उनके योगदान के लिए राज्यसभा के लिए मनोनीत किया गया है?
A
उज्ज्वल निकम
B
डॉ. मीनाक्षी जैन
✓ Correct
C
हरिकृष्णन
D
सी. सदानंदन मास्टर

Solution

Correct answer: B. Historian Dr. Meenakshi Jain was nominated to the Rajya Sabha in July 2025 in recognition of her contribution to history and scholarship.

A is incorrect: Ujjwal Nikam is a well-known public prosecutor nominated for legal/public service, not for history scholarship.

C is incorrect: Harikishan is not the person nominated for contributions to history.

D is incorrect: C. Sadanandan Master was nominated for social/public service, not for history scholarship.

💡 The President nominates 12 members to the Rajya Sabha for distinction in literature, science, art and social service.
Q.No 28 Current AffairsHindi
वैश्विक जीवनक्षमता सूचकांक किसके द्वारा जारी किया जाता है?
A
अर्थशास्त्री खुफिया इकाई
✓ Correct
B
विश्व बैंक
C
संयुक्त राष्ट्र विकास कार्यक्रम
D
विश्व आर्थिक मंच

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Global Liveability Index is published by the Economist Intelligence Unit (EIU), ranking cities on stability, healthcare, culture, environment, education and infrastructure.

B is incorrect: The World Bank publishes development indicators and the Ease of Doing Business work, not this index.

C is incorrect: The UNDP publishes the Human Development Index, not the Liveability Index.

D is incorrect: The World Economic Forum publishes the Global Competitiveness Report, not this one.

💡 Vienna has frequently topped the EIU's Global Liveability Index in recent years.
Q.No 32 Current AffairsHindi
राष्ट्रपति की एड-डी-कैंप ( /॥०६-०६-८80 - #00) के रूप में सेवा करने वाली पहली महिला नौसेना अधिकारी कौन बनीं?
A
लेफ्टिनेंट कमांडर यशस्वी सोलंकी
✓ Correct
B
लेफ्टिनेंट भावना सिंह
C
कमांडर प्रिया मेनन
D
कैप्टन शिखा शर्मा

Solution

Correct answer: A. Lt Cdr Yashasvi Solanki became the first woman naval officer to serve as an Aide-de-Camp (ADC) to the President of India.

B is incorrect: Lt Bhavna Singh is not the officer associated with this first.

C is incorrect: Commander Priya Menon is not the record-holder named here.

D is incorrect: Captain Shikha Sharma is not the first woman naval ADC to the President.

💡 An Aide-de-Camp is a personal military assistant to a high official such as the President, who is the Supreme Commander of the Armed Forces.
Q.No 37 Current AffairsHindi
नवंबर 2024 में, कौन सा देश 6 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों के लिए सोशल मीडिया के उपयोग पर प्रतिबंध लगाने वाला कानून पारित करने वाला पहला देश बन गया है?
A
भारत
B
यूएसए
C
जापान
D
ऑस्ट्रेलिया
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. In November 2024, Australia became the first country to pass a law banning social-media use for children under 16.

A is incorrect: India has discussed age regulation but did not pass such a first-of-its-kind law.

B is incorrect: The USA has state-level debates but no such national ban.

C is incorrect: Japan did not pass this pioneering law.

💡 Australia's law puts the responsibility on social-media platforms to keep under-16 users off their services.
Q.No 35 Current AffairsEnglish
Which micro-missile system did India test in 2025?
A
Astra-ll
B
Vibhavasu
C
Bhargavastra
✓ Correct
D
Pralay

Solution

Correct answer: C. Bhargavastra is a low-cost micro-missile counter-drone system that India tested in 2025, designed to neutralise swarms of small drones.

A is incorrect: Astra is a beyond-visual-range air-to-air missile, not the 2025 micro-missile counter-drone system.

B is incorrect: Vibhavasu is not the system tested for this purpose.

D is incorrect: Pralay is a short-range ballistic missile, not a micro counter-drone system.

💡 Counter-drone systems like Bhargavastra are increasingly important against the growing threat of low-cost drone swarms.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsEnglish
In , the Centre officially announced the scrapping of the 'No-Detention Policy' for Classes 5 and 8 in central government-run schools?
A
November 2024
B
December 2024
✓ Correct
C
January 2025
D
October 2024

Solution

Correct answer: B. In December 2024, the Centre officially scrapped the 'No-Detention Policy' for Classes 5 and 8 in central-government-run schools, allowing students who fail year-end exams to be held back (after a re-test).

A is incorrect: November 2024 is not when the official announcement was made.

C is incorrect: January 2025 is after the December 2024 announcement.

D is incorrect: October 2024 is incorrect.

💡 The No-Detention Policy had been part of the Right to Education Act; it was diluted by a 2019 amendment empowering governments to decide on detention.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsEnglish
एग रा का 2 आई.पी.आर.आई. (57रा) रिपोर्ट के अनुसार, 2020-24 में सभी हथियारों के आयात में एशिया और ओशिनिया के देशों की दा
A
33%
✓ Correct
B
50%
C
74%
D
81%

Solution

Correct answer: A. According to the SIPRI report on arms transfers (2020-24), Asia and Oceania accounted for about 33% of all global arms imports, the largest regional share.

B is incorrect: 50% overstates the region's share of arms imports.

C is incorrect: 74% is far too high.

D is incorrect: 81% is not the reported figure.

💡 SIPRI (Stockholm International Peace Research Institute) tracks global military spending and arms transfers.
Q.No 37 Current AffairsEnglish
পঞ্চম ও অষ্টম শ্রেণীর 'নো-ডিটেনশন নীতি' বাতিলের জন্য একটি সরকারী বিজ্ঞপ্তি অনুসারে, যদি শিক্ষার্থীরা বার্ষিক পরীক্ষায় উত্তীর্ণ হতে ব্যর্থ হয়, তাহলে তাদের অতিরিক্ত কোচিং দেওয়া হবে এবং ফলাফল প্রকাশের মাসের মধ্যে পুনরায় পরীক্ষা দেওয়ার সুযোগ দেওয়া হবে।
A
2
✓ Correct
B
5
C
6
D
4

Solution

Correct answer: A. Per the government notification scrapping the 'no-detention policy' for Classes 5 and 8, students who fail the year-end exam are given extra coaching and a re-test within 2 months of the result.

B is incorrect: 5 months is not the period specified.

C is incorrect: 6 months is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 4 months is not the prescribed re-examination window.

💡 The change lets schools hold back students who fail even after the re-test, reversing automatic promotion.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsBengali⚠ low OCR confidence
ট্রান্সপারেন্সি ইন্টারন্যাশনাল কোন প্রতিবেদন প্রকাশ করে না? I. গণতন্ত্র সূচক Il. দুনীতির ধারণা সূচক
A
Only I
✓ Correct
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: A. Transparency International does NOT publish the Democracy Index (Statement I) - that is published by the Economist Intelligence Unit. Transparency International does publish the Corruption Perceptions Index (Statement II). So the correct choice is 'Only I'.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' is wrong because TI does publish the Corruption Perceptions Index.

C is incorrect: 'Both I and II' is wrong since TI does publish the Corruption Perceptions Index.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong because TI does not publish the Democracy Index.

💡 Transparency International is best known for its annual Corruption Perceptions Index (CPI).
Q.No 33 Current AffairsEnglish
Who was appointed as the new Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) of India in February 2025?
A
Girish Chandra Murmu
B
K. Sanjay Murthy
✓ Correct
C
Vineet Pandey
D
Girish Chandra Tripathi

Solution

Correct answer: B. K. Sanjay Murthy was appointed the Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) of India, taking charge in this period after Girish Chandra Murmu.

A is incorrect: Girish Chandra Murmu was the previous CAG, not the newly appointed one.

C is incorrect: Vineet Pandey is not the appointee.

D is incorrect: Girish Chandra Tripathi is not the CAG named here.

💡 The CAG audits government accounts and is a key constitutional authority under Article 148.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsEnglish
About of children in India aged 6-23 months lack diversity in diet as suggested by the World Health Organization in 2024.
A
77%
✓ Correct
B
12%
C
90%
D
32%

Solution

Correct answer: A. As highlighted around 2024, about 77% of Indian children aged 6-23 months lacked adequate dietary diversity as defined by WHO standards.

B is incorrect: 12% greatly understates the proportion.

C is incorrect: 90% overstates the reported figure.

D is incorrect: 32% is lower than the reported share.

💡 Dietary diversity (eating from several food groups) is a key indicator of child nutrition.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsEnglish
Which of the following ministry has unveiled ‘Logistics Ease Across Different States (LEADS) 2024’ Report?
A
Ministry of Commerce & Industry
✓ Correct
B
Ministry of Finance
C
Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways
D
Ministry of Cooperation

Solution

Correct answer: A. The 'Logistics Ease Across Different States (LEADS) 2024' report was unveiled by the Ministry of Commerce & Industry.

B is incorrect: The Ministry of Finance does not publish the LEADS report.

C is incorrect: The Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways is not the publishing ministry.

D is incorrect: The Ministry of Cooperation does not release LEADS.

💡 LEADS assesses and ranks states/UTs on the efficiency of their logistics ecosystem.
Q.No 30 Current AffairsHindi
वर्ष 2027 में 43वां ब्रिक्स शिखर सम्मेलन कहाँ आयोजित किया गया?
A
बीजिंग, चीन
B
नई दिल्‍ली, भारत
✓ Correct
C
मास्को, रूस
D
जोहान्सबर्ग, दक्षिण अफ्रीका

Solution

Correct answer: B. India is set to host the 2027 (43rd) BRICS Summit in New Delhi.

A is incorrect: Beijing, China hosted earlier summits but not the 2027 edition.

C is incorrect: Moscow, Russia is not the host for this summit.

D is incorrect: Johannesburg, South Africa hosted the 2023 summit.

💡 BRICS expanded in 2024 to include new members beyond the original five countries.
Q.No 34 Current AffairsHindi
2025 में म्यांमार भूकंप के लिए भारत का रेस्पॉनन्‍्स ऑपरेशन क्या था?
A
ऑपरेशन समुद्र सेतु
B
ऑपरेशन सहायता
C
ऑपरेशन ब्रह्मा
✓ Correct
D
ऑपरेशन मैत्री

Solution

Correct answer: C. India's relief response to the 2025 Myanmar earthquake was named Operation Brahma, sending aid and rescue teams.

A is incorrect: Operation Samudra Setu was a 2020 sea evacuation during COVID-19.

B is incorrect: 'Operation Sahayata' is not the name used for this response.

D is incorrect: Operation Maitri was India's 2015 relief mission for the Nepal earthquake.

💡 India frequently leads such 'first responder' humanitarian missions in its neighbourhood.
Q.No 36 Current AffairsEnglish
The 3-day International Bird Festival 2025 was organised at from 16 to 18 February 2025.
A
Prayagraj
✓ Correct
B
Bhopal
C
Patna
D
Bhagalpur

Solution

Correct answer: A. The 3-day International Bird Festival 2025 was organised at Prayagraj (Uttar Pradesh) from 16 to 18 February 2025.

B is incorrect: Bhopal was not the host city.

C is incorrect: Patna did not host this festival.

D is incorrect: Bhagalpur was not the venue.

💡 Such bird festivals promote birdwatching and wetland/biodiversity conservation.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsEnglish
The Operation Gideon Chariots is associated with which of the following country?
A
India
B
israel
✓ Correct
C
Turkey
D
UAE

Solution

Correct answer: B. Operation 'Gideon's Chariots' is associated with Israel - it was the name of an Israeli military operation in Gaza in 2025.

A is incorrect: India is not associated with this operation.

C is incorrect: Turkey is not linked to it.

D is incorrect: The UAE is not associated with the operation.

💡 Military operations are often given codenames drawn from history or mythology.
Q.No 29 Current AffairsHindi
वर्ष 207 में तीसरा ब्रिक्स (8805) शिखर सम्मेलन कहाँ आयोजित किया गया था?
A
Moscow, Russia
B
Sanya, China
✓ Correct
C
New Delhi, India
D
Johannesburg, South Africa

Solution

Correct answer: B. The third BRICS Summit (2011) was held in Sanya, China.

A is incorrect: Moscow did not host the third BRICS summit.

C is incorrect: New Delhi hosted the fourth BRICS summit (2012).

D is incorrect: Johannesburg hosted later summits.

💡 South Africa joined the grouping in 2010-11, turning BRIC into BRICS.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsHindi
केंद्रीय बजट 2025-26 की घोषणा में मखाना बोर्ड की स्थापना के लिए किस राज्य को चुना गया है?
A
उत्तर प्रदेश
B
बिहार
✓ Correct
C
पश्चिम बंगाल
D
असम

Solution

Correct answer: B. In the Union Budget 2025-26, Bihar was chosen for the establishment of a Makhana (fox-nut) Board, as the state is India's largest makhana producer.

A is incorrect: Uttar Pradesh was not selected for the Makhana Board.

C is incorrect: West Bengal was not chosen.

D is incorrect: Assam was not selected.

💡 Bihar accounts for the bulk of India's makhana (fox-nut/lotus seed) production.
Q.No 35 Current AffairsEnglish
जूलॉजिकल सर्वे ऑफ इंडिया (जेड.एस.आई.) ने 30 जून, 2025 को अपना वां स्थापना दिवस मनाया।
A
110
✓ Correct
B
90
C
99
D
115

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Zoological Survey of India (ZSI), founded in 1916, celebrated its 110th Foundation Day on 30 June 2025.

B is incorrect: 90 years would place its founding in the 1930s, which is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 99 is not the milestone marked in 2025.

D is incorrect: 115 would imply a founding around 1910, which is wrong.

💡 The ZSI, headquartered in Kolkata, surveys and documents India's faunal diversity.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
स्वास्थ्य एवं परिवार कल्याण मंत्रालय के 202] के आंकड़ों के अनुसार, भारत में प्रजनन दर 202 में पर स्थिर रही है।
A
2.0
✓ Correct
B
3.0
C
1.5
D
1.7

Solution

Correct answer: A. According to Ministry of Health and Family Welfare data, India's Total Fertility Rate (TFR) stabilised at about 2.0 around 2021 - close to the replacement level.

B is incorrect: 3.0 is higher than India's current fertility rate.

C is incorrect: 1.5 is below India's reported figure.

D is incorrect: 1.7 is below the stated rate.

💡 The replacement-level fertility rate is about 2.1 children per woman.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsHindi
क्वाड (क्यु.यु.ए.डी.) नेता शिखर सम्मेलन-2025 में आयोजित किया जाएगा।
A
यू.एस.ए.
B
ऑस्ट्रेलिया
C
भारत
✓ Correct
D
जापान

Solution

Correct answer: C. The Quad Leaders' Summit 2025 is scheduled to be hosted in India.

A is incorrect: The USA hosted an earlier Quad summit, not the 2025 one.

B is incorrect: Australia is not the 2025 host.

D is incorrect: Japan hosted a previous summit, not 2025.

💡 The Quad is a grouping of India, the USA, Japan and Australia for Indo-Pacific cooperation.
Q.No 28 Current AffairsHindi
वर्ष 202 में चौथे ब्रिक्स शिखर सम्मेलन की मेजबानी किस देश ने की थी?
A
Brazil
B
China
C
India
✓ Correct
D
South Africa

Solution

Correct answer: C. India hosted the fourth BRICS Summit in 2012 (in New Delhi).

A is incorrect: Brazil hosted other BRICS summits, not the fourth.

B is incorrect: China hosted the third summit (2011).

D is incorrect: South Africa hosted the fifth summit (2013).

💡 The New Delhi summit's theme focused on stability, security and prosperity.
Q.No 35 Current AffairsHindi
जून 2025 में, भारत के किस क्षेत्र में "पोर्टलाका भारत" नामक पुष्पी पादप की एक नई प्रजाति की खोज की गई है?
A
अरावली पहाड़ियाँ
✓ Correct
B
पश्चिमी घाट
C
पूर्वी घाट
D
थार मरूस्थल

Solution

Correct answer: A. In June 2025 a new species of flowering plant named 'Portulaca bharatensis' was discovered in the Aravalli Hills region.

B is incorrect: It was not found in the Western Ghats.

C is incorrect: It was not discovered in the Eastern Ghats.

D is incorrect: It was not found in the Thar Desert.

💡 New plant species are regularly described from India's varied ecological regions.
Q.No 39 Current AffairsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा अंतर्राष्ट्रीय संगठन "टुवर्ड्स 000" रणनीति से जुड़ा है?
A
विश्व व्यापार संगठन
B
अंतर्राष्ट्रीय न्यायालय
C
अंतर्री्ट्रीय सौर गठबंधन
✓ Correct
D
सार्क

Solution

Correct answer: C. The 'Towards 1000' strategy is associated with the International Solar Alliance (ISA).

A is incorrect: The WTO deals with trade rules, not this solar strategy.

B is incorrect: The International Court of Justice settles legal disputes.

D is incorrect: SAARC is a regional grouping, not linked to this strategy.

💡 The ISA, co-founded by India and France, promotes solar energy across sunshine-rich countries.
Q.No 25 Current AffairsHindi
वर्ष 200 में दूसरा ब्रिक शिखर सम्मेलन किस देश में आयोजित किया गया था?
A
Russia
B
India
C
Brazil
✓ Correct
D
China

Solution

Correct answer: C. The second BRIC Summit (2010) was held in Brazil (Brasilia).

A is incorrect: Russia (Yekaterinburg) hosted the first BRIC summit in 2009.

B is incorrect: India hosted the fourth summit (2012).

D is incorrect: China hosted the third summit (2011).

💡 The grouping was 'BRIC' until South Africa joined to make it 'BRICS' from 2010-11.
Q.No 26 Current AffairsHindi
2025 में, लाल किले पर भारत के 79वें स्वतंत्रता दिवस समारोह की थीम क्या है?
A
आज़ादी का अमृत
B
स्वर्णिम भारत
C
विकास की मंज़िल
D
नया भारत
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Per the announcement, the theme of India's 79th Independence Day celebrations at the Red Fort in 2025 reflected the idea of a 'Naya Bharat' (New India).

A is incorrect: 'Azadi ka Amrit' was the earlier Amrit Mahotsav theme.

B is incorrect: 'Swarnim Bharat' was not the 2025 theme.

C is incorrect: 'Vikas ki Manzil' was not the chosen theme.

💡 India celebrated its 79th Independence Day on 15 August 2025.
Q.No 34 Current AffairsEnglish
Where has the Government of India launched the Sth Marine Census in the "Coastal state fisheries conference 2025"?
A
Kolkata
B
Cuttack
C
Chennai
D
Mumbai
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The Government of India launched the 5th Marine Census at the 'Coastal State Fisheries Conference 2025' held in Mumbai.

A is incorrect: It was not launched in Kolkata.

B is incorrect: It was not launched in Cuttack.

C is incorrect: It was not launched in Chennai.

💡 A marine fisheries census counts fishing households, craft and infrastructure along the coast.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
The 11th BRICS parliamentary forum was held in in June 2025.
A
Beijing
B
Brasilia
✓ Correct
C
Shanghai
D
Vladivostok

Solution

Correct answer: B. The 11th BRICS Parliamentary Forum was held in Brasilia (Brazil) in June 2025, as Brazil chaired BRICS that year.

A is incorrect: Beijing did not host the 2025 forum.

C is incorrect: Shanghai was not the venue.

D is incorrect: Vladivostok was not the host city.

💡 Brazil held the BRICS chairship in 2025, hosting various BRICS meetings.
Q.No 23 Current AffairsHindi
2025 में हरियाणा का राज्यपाल किसे नियुक्त किया गया?
A
कविन्द्र गुप्ता
B
मनोज कुमार सिंह
C
पुसापति अशोक गजपति राजू
D
अशीम कुमार घोष
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Ashim Kumar Ghosh was appointed Governor of Haryana in 2025.

A is incorrect: Kavinder Gupta was appointed to another role/UT.

B is incorrect: Manoj Kumar Singh is not the Haryana Governor.

C is incorrect: Pusapati Ashok Gajapathi Raju was appointed Governor of another state.

💡 Governors are appointed by the President and hold office during the President's pleasure.
Q.No 24 Current AffairsHindi
2025 में, किस भारतीय ब्यूरोक्रेट को रिसर्च एंड एनालिसिस विंग (९४५४) का प्रमुख नियुक्त किया गया?
A
रवि सिन्हा
B
प्रवीण सूद
C
अजय कुमार
D
पराग जैन
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Parag Jain was appointed the chief (Secretary) of the Research and Analysis Wing (R&AW) in 2025.

A is incorrect: Ravi Sinha was the previous R&AW chief.

B is incorrect: Praveen Sood heads the CBI, not R&AW.

C is incorrect: Ajay Kumar is not the R&AW chief named here.

💡 R&AW is India's external intelligence agency, established in 1968.
Q.No 34 Current AffairsHindi
जुलाई 2025 में, किस संस्थान ने भारतीय जनसंख्या में वृद्धावस्था को प्रेरित करने वाले संकेतकों का मानचित्रण करने के लिए भारत अध्ययन का संचालन किया?
A
केंद्रीय औषधि अनुसंधान संस्थान (सी.डी.आर.आई.), लखनऊ
B
राष्ट्रीय पोषण संस्थान (एन.आई.एन.), हैदराबाद
C
भारतीय विज्ञान संस्थान (आई.आई.एस.सी.), बेंगलुरु
✓ Correct
D
टाटा इंस्टीट्यूट ऑफ फंडामेंटल रिसर्च (टी.आई.एफ.आर.), मुंबई

Solution

Correct answer: C. In July 2025, the Indian Institute of Science (IISc), Bengaluru conducted the India study mapping indicators that drive ageing in the Indian population.

A is incorrect: CDRI Lucknow was not the institute cited.

B is incorrect: NIN Hyderabad was not the lead institute.

D is incorrect: TIFR Mumbai was not credited with this study.

💡 Such studies help understand biological ageing markers specific to Indian populations.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsHindi
फिलाडेल्फिया कॉरिडोर गाजा (तथा की सीमा पर स्थित है।
A
ईरान
B
र्टर्की
C
यू.ए.ई.
D
मिस्र
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The Philadelphi Corridor is a strip located along the border between Gaza and Egypt.

A is incorrect: It is not on the Iran border.

B is incorrect: It is not on the Turkey border.

C is incorrect: It is not on the UAE border.

💡 The Philadelphi Corridor is a narrow buffer zone along the Gaza-Egypt frontier.
Q.No 23 Current AffairsHindi
2025 मध्ये कोणत्या प्रमुख काँग्रेस सदस्याने ऑपरेशन सिंदूरबहल भारताच्या राजनैतिक संपकचि नेतृत्व अमेरिका आणि पनामापर्यत केले?
A
राहुल गांधी
B
पी. चिदंबरम
C
शशी थरूर
✓ Correct
D
सोनिया गांधी

Solution

Correct answer: C. In 2025, senior Congress leader Shashi Tharoor led India's diplomatic outreach delegation related to Operation Sindoor to countries including the USA and Panama.

A is incorrect: Rahul Gandhi did not lead this particular delegation.

B is incorrect: P. Chidambaram did not lead it.

D is incorrect: Sonia Gandhi did not lead the delegation.

💡 India sent multi-party delegations abroad to explain its position after Operation Sindoor.
Q.No 25 Current AffairsHindi
2025 मध्ये असोसिएशन ऑफ मल्याठ्ठम मूव्ही आर्टिस्ट्स (20५५) चे अध्यक्ष म्हणून कोणाची निवड झाली, ज्यामुव्ठे या गटातील महिला नेतृत्वासाठी एक मैलाचा दगड ठरला?
A
अंसिबा हसन
B
कुकू परमेश्वरन
C
लक्ष्मीप्रिया
D
श्ेता मेनन
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. In 2025, Shweta Menon was elected President of the Association of Malayalam Movie Artists (AMMA), a milestone for women's leadership in the body.

A is incorrect: Ansiba Hassan was not elected president.

B is incorrect: Kukku Parameswaran is not the elected president.

C is incorrect: Lakshmipriya is not the elected president.

💡 AMMA is the influential professional body of Malayalam cinema actors.
Q.No 30 Current AffairsHindi
फेब्ुवारी 2025 मध्ये, खालीलपैकी कोणी भारतातील पहिला स्वदेशी स्वयंचलित बायोमेडिकल वेस्ट ट्रीटमेंट प्लांट "सृजनम" सुरू केला?
A
नरेंद्र मोदी
B
जितेंद्र सिंग
✓ Correct
C
राजनाथ सिंह
D
मनोज सिन्हा

Solution

Correct answer: B. In February 2025, Union Minister Dr Jitendra Singh launched 'Srijanam', India's first indigenous automated biomedical-waste treatment plant.

A is incorrect: Narendra Modi did not launch this plant.

C is incorrect: Rajnath Singh did not launch it.

D is incorrect: Manoj Sinha did not launch it.

💡 Proper biomedical-waste treatment prevents the spread of infection from hospital waste.
Q.No 35 Current AffairsHindi
शांघाय सहकार्य संघटना येथे स्थापन झाली.
A
नवी दिल्‍ली
B
तेहरान
C
इस्लामाबाद
D
शांघाय
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) was established at Shanghai (China) in 2001.

A is incorrect: It was not founded in New Delhi.

B is incorrect: It was not founded in Tehran.

C is incorrect: It was not founded in Islamabad.

💡 The SCO grew out of the 'Shanghai Five'; India and Pakistan joined as full members in 2017.
Q.No 36 Current AffairsHindi
भारत और भूटान ने 24 से 25 अप्रैल 2025 तक में सीमा शुल्क की 6वीं संयुक्त समूह बैठक आयोजित की थी।
A
थिम्पू
✓ Correct
B
गांधीनगर
C
पारो
D
नई दिल्‍ली

Solution

Correct answer: A. India and Bhutan held the 6th Joint Group of Customs meeting at Thimphu from 24 to 25 April 2025.

B is incorrect: It was not held at Gandhinagar.

C is incorrect: It was not held at Paro.

D is incorrect: It was not held in New Delhi.

💡 Thimphu is the capital of Bhutan, India's close Himalayan neighbour.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
सर क्षेत्र जिला एस.डी.जी. सूचकांक 2023-24 में, निम्नलिखित में से किस राज्य के सभी जिलों को “अग्रणी” के रूप में वर्गीकृत किया गया है? [. सिक्किम [. मिजोरम
A
Only I
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. In the District SDG Index 2023-24, all districts of both Sikkim (I) and Mizoram (II) were classified as 'Front Runners', so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' omits Mizoram.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' omits Sikkim.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both states' districts were Front Runners.

💡 The SDG India Index tracks progress on the Sustainable Development Goals; 'Front Runner' is a high-performing category.
Q.No 23 Current AffairsHindi
अप्रैल 2025 में १००ा0७९€ इंडिया के कंट्री मैनेजिंग डायरेक्टर के रूप में किसे नियुक्त किया गया?
A
ईशान चटर्जी
B
गुंजन सोनी
✓ Correct
C
मानसी सुब्रमण्यम
D
नटराजन शंकर

Solution

Correct answer: B. Gunjan Soni was appointed the Country Managing Director of the named company (India) in April 2025.

A is incorrect: Ishan Chatterjee is not the appointee cited.

C is incorrect: Mansi Subramaniam is not the appointee.

D is incorrect: Natarajan Shankar is not the appointee.

💡 Leadership appointments at major tech/e-commerce firms are closely tracked in current affairs.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
शहरी शासन सूचकांक (यू.जी.आई.) 2024 ने भारतीय राज्यों का मूल्यांकन कितनी श्रेणियों में किया था?
A
2
B
4
✓ Correct
C
6
D
7

Solution

Correct answer: B. The Urban Governance Index (UGI) 2024 evaluated Indian states across 4 main categories.

A is incorrect: 2 is fewer than the categories used.

C is incorrect: 6 is not the number of categories.

D is incorrect: 7 is incorrect.

💡 Such governance indices help benchmark the performance of urban local bodies.
Q.No 22 Current AffairsEnglish
Who became the private secretary to Prime Minister Modi in March 2025?
A
Nidhi Tewari
✓ Correct
B
Sunita Williams
C
Danish Mahajan
D
Anju Rathi Rana

Solution

Correct answer: A. Nidhi Tewari became the private secretary to Prime Minister Modi in March 2025.

B is incorrect: Sunita Williams is a NASA astronaut.

C is incorrect: Danish Mahajan is not the appointee.

D is incorrect: Anju Rathi Rana was appointed Law Secretary, a different post.

💡 The PM's office (PMO) has several private secretaries and officers on special duty.
Q.No 23 Current AffairsEnglish
Who was appointed Union Law Secretary in March 2025?
A
Anju Rathi Rana
✓ Correct
B
Shubhanshu Shukla
C
K. Vinod Chandran
D
Danish Mahajan

Solution

Correct answer: A. Anju Rathi Rana was appointed the Union Law Secretary in March 2025.

B is incorrect: Shubhanshu Shukla is an astronaut (Gaganyaan/Axiom), not the Law Secretary.

C is incorrect: K. Vinod Chandran is a judge, not the Law Secretary.

D is incorrect: Danish Mahajan is not the appointee.

💡 The Law Secretary heads the Department of Legal Affairs in the Ministry of Law and Justice.
Q.No 35 Current AffairsEnglish
The BIMSTEC Youth Summit-2025 was held in from 7-11 February 2025.
A
Chennai
B
Gandhinagar
✓ Correct
C
Dhaka
D
Colombo

Solution

Correct answer: B. The BIMSTEC Youth Summit 2025 was held in Gandhinagar (Gujarat) from 7-11 February 2025.

A is incorrect: It was not held in Chennai.

C is incorrect: It was not held in Dhaka.

D is incorrect: It was not held in Colombo.

💡 BIMSTEC links countries around the Bay of Bengal, including India, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Myanmar and Thailand.
Q.No 23 Current AffairsOdia
201 ରେ କେଉଁ ସହରରେ 8ମ 8865 ଶିଖର ସମିଳନୀ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା ?
A
Goa, India
✓ Correct
B
Ufa, Russia
C
Johannesburg, South Africa
D
Beijing, China

Solution

Correct answer: A. The 8th BRICS Summit (2016) was held in Goa, India.

B is incorrect: Ufa, Russia hosted the 7th summit (2015).

C is incorrect: Johannesburg hosted later summits.

D is incorrect: Beijing did not host the 8th summit.

💡 At the Goa summit, BRICS leaders also met with BIMSTEC leaders.
Q.No 31 Current AffairsOdia
କେଉଁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରଶାସିତ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ଏହାର ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ଏତିହ୍ୟକୁ ସଂରକ୍ଷଣ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଏକ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଭାବରେ ଚିନାର ଗଛର ଜିଓ-ଟ୍ୟାଗିଙ୍ଗ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛି?
A
ଜାମ୍ମୁ ଓ କାଶ୍ମୀର
✓ Correct
B
OR
C
ପଣ୍ଡିଚେରୀ
D
ଆଣ୍ଡାମାନ ଏବଂ ନିକୋବର

Solution

Correct answer: A. Jammu & Kashmir began geo-tagging of Chinar trees as a step to preserve its natural heritage.

B is incorrect: This option does not name the correct UT.

C is incorrect: Puducherry did not start this Chinar initiative.

D is incorrect: Andaman and Nicobar is not associated with Chinar trees.

💡 The Chinar is an iconic tree of Kashmir, famous for its red autumn foliage.
Q.No 39 Current AffairsEnglish
2024 ର ଗ୍ଲୋବଲ ହଙ୍ଗର ଇଣ୍ଡେକୁରେ ଭାରତର ସ୍ୟୋର କେତେ ଥିଲା?
A
27.3
✓ Correct
B
31.1
C
21.8
D
11.1

Solution

Correct answer: A. In the 2024 Global Hunger Index, India's score was 27.3, placing it in the 'serious' category.

B is incorrect: 31.1 is not India's 2024 GHI score.

C is incorrect: 21.8 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 11.1 is too low.

💡 The Global Hunger Index measures hunger using undernourishment, child wasting, child stunting and child mortality.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsOdia
2024 ଇନଭାଇରମେଣ୍ଟ ପରଫର୍ମାନ୍ସ ଇଣ୍ଡେଳ୍ସରେ ଚୀନ ସ୍ଥାନ ପାଇଛି ।
A
156th
✓ Correct
B
124th
C
101st
D
111th

Solution

Correct answer: A. In the 2024 Environmental Performance Index, China was ranked around 156th.

B is incorrect: 124th is not China's rank.

C is incorrect: 101st is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 111th is not the rank.

💡 The Environmental Performance Index (EPI) is produced by Yale and Columbia universities.
Q.No 29 Current AffairsHindi
लगातार स्थानांतरण के लिए जाने जाने वाले कौन से आई.ए.एस. अधिकारी अप्रैल 2025 में सेवानिवृत्त हुए हैं?
A
सुजाता सौनिक
B
अशोक खेमका
✓ Correct
C
राजीव टोपनो
D
दुर्गा शक्ति नागपाल

Solution

Correct answer: B. IAS officer Ashok Khemka, known for his many transfers during his career, retired in April 2025.

A is incorrect: Sujata Saunik is a serving senior officer, not the one described.

C is incorrect: Rajiv Topno is not the officer cited.

D is incorrect: Durga Shakti Nagpal is not the officer who retired here.

💡 Ashok Khemka was transferred over 50 times during his three-decade career.
Q.No 30 Current AffairsHindi
मई 2025 तक, भारत के मुख्य सूचना आयुक्त (सी.आई.सी.) कौन हैं?
A
यशवर्धन कुमार सिन्हा
B
हीरालाल सामरिया
✓ Correct
C
सुधीर भार्गव
D
सुरेश चंद्र

Solution

Correct answer: B. As of May 2025, Heeralal Samariya was the Chief Information Commissioner (CIC) of India.

A is incorrect: Y.K. Sinha was a previous CIC.

C is incorrect: Sudhir Bhargava was an earlier CIC.

D is incorrect: Suresh Chandra is not the CIC.

💡 The CIC heads the Central Information Commission under the RTI Act, 2005.
Q.No 35 Current AffairsHindi
मसाला उद्योग के लिए भारतीय मसाला अनुसंधान संस्थान (आई.आई.एस.आर.), कोझ्ञिकोड द्वारा विकसित नई हल्के रंग की 'हल्दी' किस्म का नाम क्या हैं?
A
IISR Jyoti
B
IISR Varna
C
IISR Surya
✓ Correct
D
IISR Shakti

Solution

Correct answer: C. The new light-coloured turmeric variety developed by the Indian Institute of Spices Research (IISR), Kozhikode, is named 'IISR Surya'.

A is incorrect: 'IISR Jyoti' is not the new turmeric variety named.

B is incorrect: 'IISR Varna' is not the variety.

D is incorrect: 'IISR Shakti' is not the variety.

💡 The IISR develops improved varieties of spices like turmeric, pepper and cardamom.
Q.No 37 Current AffairsHindi
विश्व बैंक भूमि सम्मेलन-2025 में आयोजित किया गया था।
A
New York
B
Brasilia
C
Washington D.C.
✓ Correct
D
Shanghai

Solution

Correct answer: C. The World Bank Land Conference 2025 was held in Washington D.C.

A is incorrect: It was not held in New York.

B is incorrect: It was not held in Brasilia.

D is incorrect: It was not held in Shanghai.

💡 The World Bank is headquartered in Washington D.C.
Q.No 39 Current AffairsEnglish
नेटवर्क तत्परता सूचकांक 2024 ने कितने प्रमुख स्तंभों के आधार पर 33 अर्थव्यवस्थाओं की नेटवर्क तत्परता का मूल्यांकन किया था?
A
4
✓ Correct
B
6
C
8
D
10

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Network Readiness Index 2024 evaluated economies on 4 main pillars (Technology, People, Governance and Impact).

B is incorrect: 6 is not the number of pillars.

C is incorrect: 8 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 10 is incorrect.

💡 The Network Readiness Index assesses how well countries leverage information and communication technologies.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsHindi
दर रिपोर्ट ऑन चाइल्ड राइट्स इन इंडिया: एन ओवरव्यू ऑफ़ द पास्ट डिकेड' शीर्षक से अध्ययन, द्वारा डेस्क समीक्षा अध्ययन के रूप में शुरू [गया था।
A
चाइल्ड राइट्स एंड यू
✓ Correct
B
ऑक्सफैम इंडिया
C
प्रथम
D
सेवलाइफ फाउंडेशन

Solution

Correct answer: A. The study 'Report on Child Rights in India: An Overview of the Past Decade' was carried out as a desk review by Child Rights and You (CRY).

B is incorrect: Oxfam India did not conduct this particular study.

C is incorrect: Pratham is known for the ASER education report, not this study.

D is incorrect: SaveLIFE Foundation works on road safety.

💡 CRY (Child Rights and You) is a well-known NGO working for the rights of underprivileged children.
Q.No 23 Current AffairsHindi
ब्रिक्स (805) 2025 के लिए ब्राजील की प्रमुख प्राथमिकताओं में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा क्षेत्र शामिल है?
A
व्यापार, निवेश और वित्त
✓ Correct
B
खेल, पर्यटन और युवा मामले
C
अंतरिक्ष अन्वेषण, खगोल विज्ञान और उपग्रह सहयोग
D
सांस्कृतिक विरासत, भाषा संवर्धन और पारंपरिक कलाएँ

Solution

Correct answer: A. Trade, investment and finance was among Brazil's key priorities for its BRICS 2025 chairship.

B is incorrect: Sports, tourism and youth affairs was not a stated key priority area.

C is incorrect: Space exploration cooperation was not the headline priority.

D is incorrect: Cultural heritage and language promotion was not the main priority.

💡 Brazil chaired BRICS in 2025, hosting its summit and ministerial meetings.
Q.No 32 Current AffairsHindi
भारत में तटीय, वेडर पक्षियों की पहली जनगणना जनवरी 2025 में में शुरू हुई थी।
A
रायपुर
B
जम्मू
C
चेन्नई
D
जामनगर
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. India's first census of coastal and wader birds began in January 2025 at Jamnagar (Gujarat).

A is incorrect: It did not begin at Raipur.

B is incorrect: It did not begin at Jammu.

C is incorrect: It did not begin at Chennai.

💡 Jamnagar's Marine National Park and surrounding wetlands host many migratory and wader birds.
Q.No 31 Current AffairsHindi
दिसंबर 2024 में केरल का राज्यपाल किसे नियुक्त किया गया था?
A
विजय कुमार सिंह
B
अनुसुड़या उड़के
C
हरि बाबू कंभमपति
D
राजेंद्र विश्वनाथ आर्लेकर
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar was appointed Governor of Kerala in December 2024.

A is incorrect: Vijay Kumar Singh was appointed to another role.

B is incorrect: This option does not name the appointee.

C is incorrect: Hari Babu Kambhampati was an earlier governor of another state.

💡 Governors are appointed by the President and serve as the constitutional head of a state.
Q.No 28 Current AffairsHindi
अगस्त 2025 में लोकसभा द्वारा पारित ऑनलाइन गेमिंग के संवर्धन और विनियमन विधेयक के संदर्भ में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा कथन सही है? ।. यह विधेयक ई-स्पोर्ट्स और ऑनलाइन सोशल गेम्स को प्रोत्साहित करता है। |. यह विधेयक ऑनलाइन मनी गेमिंग सेवाओं को भी प्रोत्साहित करता है।
A
Only I
✓ Correct
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Online Gaming Bill (passed by the Lok Sabha in August 2025) promotes e-sports and online social games (I) while banning/regulating online real-money gaming - so 'Only I' is correct.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' is wrong; the bill does not promote online money-gaming.

C is incorrect: 'Both' is wrong since money-gaming is restricted, not promoted.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since e-sports are promoted.

💡 The bill seeks to curb the harms of online real-money/betting games while supporting legitimate e-sports.
Q.No 30 Current AffairsHindi
दिसंबर 2024 में किस गांव को भारत का पहला बॉर्डर सोलर विलेज घोषित किया गया?
A
मन (माणा)
B
मसाली
✓ Correct
C
मावल्यान्नॉग
D
खोनोमा

Solution

Correct answer: B. In December 2024, Masali village (in Gujarat's Banaskantha district) was declared India's first border solar village.

A is incorrect: Mana (Maana) in Uttarakhand is called India's 'first village', not the first solar border village.

C is incorrect: Mawlynnong is known as Asia's cleanest village.

D is incorrect: Khonoma is known as India's first green village.

💡 The solar village uses rooftop solar to meet its electricity needs.
Q.No 39 Current AffairsEnglish
अंतर्रष्ट्रीय आई.पी. सूचकांक 2025 इस सूचकांक का कौन सा संस्करण है?
A
13
✓ Correct
B
18
C
21
D
25

Solution

Correct answer: A. The International IP Index 2025 is the 13th edition of the index.

B is incorrect: 18 is not the edition number.

C is incorrect: 21 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 25 is incorrect.

💡 The International IP Index is released by the US Chamber of Commerce, ranking IP protection across economies.
Q.No 29 Current AffairsHindi
अप्रैल 2025 में राष्ट्रीय सुरक्षा सलाहकार बोर्ड (एन.एस.ए.बी.) का प्रमुख किसे नियुक्त किया गया है?
A
अजीत डोभाल
B
आलोक जोशी
✓ Correct
C
शिवशंकर मेनन
D
ब्रजेश मिश्रा

Solution

Correct answer: B. In April 2025, Alok Joshi was appointed the head of the National Security Advisory Board (NSAB).

A is incorrect: Ajit Doval is the National Security Adviser (NSA), a different post.

C is incorrect: Shivshankar Menon is a former NSA.

D is incorrect: Brajesh Mishra was India's first NSA.

💡 The NSAB advises the National Security Council on long-term security issues.
Q.No 30 Current AffairsHindi
प्रेम सिंह तमांग (पी.एस. गोले) ने 2024 में किस पूर्वोत्तर राज्य के मुख्यमंत्री के रूप में दूसरे कार्यकाल के लिए शपथ ली?
A
सिक्किम
✓ Correct
B
मिजोरम
C
अरुणाचल प्रदेश
D
मेघालय

Solution

Correct answer: A. Prem Singh Tamang (P.S. Golay) took oath for a second term as Chief Minister of Sikkim in 2024.

B is incorrect: He is not the CM of Mizoram.

C is incorrect: He is not the CM of Arunachal Pradesh.

D is incorrect: He is not the CM of Meghalaya.

💡 His party, the SKM, won a landslide in the 2024 Sikkim Assembly elections.
Q.No 33 Current AffairsEnglish
भारत ने वर्ष 2024 में अपने प्राणिजात में नई प्रजातियां जोड़ी है।
A
786
B
683
✓ Correct
C
888
D
1200

Solution

Correct answer: B. India added 683 new animal species to its faunal records in 2024.

A is incorrect: 786 is not the figure for new fauna species.

C is incorrect: 888 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 1200 overstates it.

💡 The Zoological Survey of India documents the addition of new faunal species each year.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsHindi
मार्च 2025 में प्रकाशित एस.आई.पी.आर.आई. (5702) रिपोर्ट के अनुसार 2020-24 में दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा हथियार आयातक देश कौन सा था?
A
यूक्रेन
✓ Correct
B
ब्राज़िल
C
जापान
D
उत्तर कोरिया

Solution

Correct answer: A. According to the SIPRI report (March 2025), Ukraine was the world's largest arms importer in 2020-24, driven by the ongoing war.

B is incorrect: Brazil was not the largest importer.

C is incorrect: Japan was not the largest importer.

D is incorrect: North Korea was not the largest importer.

💡 SIPRI tracks global arms transfers; large imports often reflect active conflicts or modernisation drives.
Q.No 29 Current AffairsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से किस राज्य में भारत का पहला जैवबहुलक विनिर्माण संयंत्र स्थापित किया जाएगा?
A
बिहार
B
मध्य प्रदेश
C
छत्तीसगढ़
D
उत्तर प्रदेश
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. India's first biopolymer manufacturing plant is to be set up in Uttar Pradesh.

A is incorrect: It is not being set up in Bihar.

B is incorrect: It is not in Madhya Pradesh.

C is incorrect: It is not in Chhattisgarh.

💡 Biopolymers are biodegradable plastics, supporting a move away from conventional plastics.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
मत्स्य पालन सब्सिडी पर समझौते को औपचारिक रूप से स्वीकार करने वाला 07वां विश्व व्यापार संगठन सदस्य बन गया है।
A
निकारागुआ
✓ Correct
B
घाना
C
केन्या
D
होंडुरस

Solution

Correct answer: A. Nicaragua became the 107th WTO member to formally accept the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies.

B is incorrect: Ghana was not the 107th member to accept.

C is incorrect: Kenya was not the 107th.

D is incorrect: Honduras was not the 107th.

💡 The WTO Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies curbs subsidies that contribute to overfishing.
Q.No 39 Current AffairsEnglish
वैश्विक आतंकवाद सूचकांक 2025 में पाकिस्तान का स्थान क्या है?
A
1
B
2
✓ Correct
C
3
D
4

Solution

Correct answer: B. Pakistan was ranked 2nd in the Global Terrorism Index 2025.

A is incorrect: It was not ranked 1st.

C is incorrect: It was not 3rd.

D is incorrect: It was not 4th.

💡 The Global Terrorism Index is published by the Institute for Economics and Peace.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
विश्व वायु गुणवत्ता रिपोर्ट 2024 में सबसे प्रदूषित देशों में पाकिस्तान की रैंकिंग क्या है?
A
3
✓ Correct
B
5
C
1
D
7

Solution

Correct answer: A. In the World Air Quality Report 2024, Pakistan was ranked among the most polluted countries, at about 3rd.

B is incorrect: 5th is not Pakistan's rank.

C is incorrect: 1st was held by another country (e.g. Bangladesh/Chad in recent reports).

D is incorrect: 7th is incorrect.

💡 The World Air Quality Report is published by IQAir, based on PM2.5 levels.
Q.No 28 Current AffairsHindi
ओडिशा के किस राजनेता ने जून 2024 में सक्रिय राजनीति से संन्यास ले लिया था?
A
नवीन पटनायक
B
बैजयंत पांडा
C
वी.के. पांडियन
✓ Correct
D
धर्मेंद्र प्रधान

Solution

Correct answer: C. In Odisha, V.K. Pandian retired from active politics in June 2024.

A is incorrect: Naveen Patnaik remained in politics.

B is incorrect: Baijayant Panda is active in politics.

D is incorrect: Dharmendra Pradhan is a serving Union Minister.

💡 V.K. Pandian was a former bureaucrat who had entered the BJD's political leadership.
Q.No 29 Current AffairsHindi
अगस्त 2024 में, सीमा सुरक्षा बल के महानिदेशक के रूप में किसे नियुक्त किया गया है?
A
दलजीत सिंह चौधरी
✓ Correct
B
वीरेंद्र बंसल
C
एम. आर. कुमार
D
निखिल जोशी

Solution

Correct answer: A. In August 2024, Daljit Singh Chaudhary was appointed Director-General of the Border Security Force (BSF).

B is incorrect: Virendra Bansal is not the appointee.

C is incorrect: M.R. Kumar is not the BSF DG.

D is incorrect: Nikhil Joshi is not the appointee.

💡 The BSF guards India's borders with Pakistan and Bangladesh.
Q.No 29 Current AffairsHindi
अक्टूबर 2024 में किस चक्रवात ने ओडिशा और पश्चिम बंगाल को प्रभावित किया था?
A
यास
B
गुलाब
C
दाना
✓ Correct
D
शाहीन

Solution

Correct answer: C. In October 2024, Cyclone 'Dana' affected Odisha and West Bengal.

A is incorrect: Cyclone Yaas struck earlier (2021).

B is incorrect: Cyclone Gulab was in 2021.

D is incorrect: Cyclone Shaheen affected the Arabian Sea region.

💡 Tropical cyclones in the Bay of Bengal frequently affect the Odisha-Bengal coast.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा हिमालयी राष्ट्र अपनी अर्थव्यवस्था को बढ़ावा देने के लिए जलविद्युत का उपयोग करके हरित क्रिप्टोकरेंसी के खनन और लाभ उठाने के तरीकों की खोज कर रहा है?
A
भूटान
✓ Correct
B
नेपाल
C
पाकिस्तान
D
भारत

Solution

Correct answer: A. Bhutan, a Himalayan nation, has been exploring the mining of 'green' cryptocurrency using its abundant hydropower.

B is incorrect: Nepal is not the country described.

C is incorrect: Pakistan is not associated with this.

D is incorrect: India is not the Himalayan nation referred to here.

💡 Bhutan has used its surplus clean hydroelectricity for digital-asset mining.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsHindi
ग्लोबल टेररिज्म इंडेक्स, में स्थित इंस्टीट्यूट फॉर इकोनॉमिक्स एंड पीस द्वारा जारी किया जाता है।
A
ऑस्ट्रेलिया
✓ Correct
B
यु.एस.ए.
C
जर्मनी
D
स्वीडन

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Global Terrorism Index is released by the Institute for Economics and Peace, which is based in Australia.

B is incorrect: It is not based in the USA.

C is incorrect: It is not based in Germany.

D is incorrect: It is not based in Sweden.

💡 The Institute for Economics and Peace also produces the Global Peace Index.
Q.No 27 Current AffairsHindi
मई 2025 तक, बार काउंसिल ऑफ इंडिया के अध्यक्ष का पद कौन संभाल रहे हैं?
A
मनन कुमार मिश्रा
✓ Correct
B
दुष्यंत दवे
C
विकास सिंह
D
पी.एस. पटवालिया

Solution

Correct answer: A. As of May 2025, Manan Kumar Mishra held the post of Chairman of the Bar Council of India.

B is incorrect: Dushyant Dave is a senior advocate, not the BCI Chairman here.

C is incorrect: Vikas Singh is a former SCBA president, not the BCI chairman cited.

D is incorrect: P.S. Patwalia is a senior advocate, not the BCI chairman.

💡 The Bar Council of India regulates legal education and the legal profession in India.
Q.No 28 Current AffairsHindi
नवंबर 2024 में इंडियन ऑयल कॉर्पोरेशन के अध्यक्ष के रूप में किसे नियुक्त किया गया है?
A
के.के. पाठक
B
आलोक जोशी
C
अरविंदर सिंह साहनी
✓ Correct
D
अरविंद श्रीवास्तव

Solution

Correct answer: C. In November 2024, Arvinder Singh Sahney was appointed Chairman of Indian Oil Corporation (IOC).

A is incorrect: K.K. Pathak is not the IOC chairman.

B is incorrect: Alok Joshi heads the NSAB.

D is incorrect: Arvind Srivastava is not the IOC chairman.

💡 Indian Oil Corporation is India's largest oil-marketing public-sector company.
Q.No 36 Current AffairsHindi
|7वां ब्रिक्स शिखर सम्मेलन में आयोजित किया गया था।
A
Vladivostok
B
Kazan
C
Rio de Janeiro
✓ Correct
D
Shanghai

Solution

Correct answer: C. The 17th BRICS Summit was held in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

A is incorrect: Vladivostok did not host it.

B is incorrect: Kazan, Russia hosted the 16th summit (2024).

D is incorrect: Shanghai did not host it.

💡 Brazil held the BRICS chairship in 2025, hosting the summit.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsHindi
मार्च में प्रकाशित एस.आई.पी.आर.आई. (570श) रिपोर्ट के अनुसार, निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा देश 2020-24 के बीच शीर्ष 5 हथियार आयातकों में से एक नहीं है:
A
भारत
B
उत्तर कोरिया
✓ Correct
C
यूक्रेन
D
पाकिस्तान

Solution

Correct answer: B. Per the SIPRI report, North Korea was NOT among the top 5 arms importers of 2020-24 (India, Ukraine, Pakistan and others were).

A is incorrect: India was among the top arms importers.

C is incorrect: Ukraine was a top arms importer (2020-24).

D is incorrect: Pakistan was among the top importers.

💡 India has long been among the world's largest arms importers, though it is boosting domestic production.
Q.No 39 Current AffairsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
एनवायरनमेंट परफॉर्मेंस इंडेक्स 2024 कितने प्रदर्शन संकेतक उपयोग करता है?
A
11
B
58
✓ Correct
C
15
D
17

Solution

Correct answer: B. The Environmental Performance Index (EPI) 2024 uses 58 performance indicators.

A is incorrect: 11 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 15 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 17 is incorrect.

💡 The EPI is produced by Yale and Columbia universities, ranking countries on environmental health and ecosystem vitality.
Q.No 26 Current AffairsHindi
जनवरी 2025 में, भारतीय वायु सेना की पश्चिमी वायु कमान की कमान किसने संभाली थी?
A
एयर मार्शल विक्रम सिंह
B
एयर मार्शल बालाकृष्णन मणिकांतन
C
एयर मार्शल जीतेंद्र मिश्रा
✓ Correct
D
एयर मार्शल सूरत सिंह

Solution

Correct answer: C. In January 2025, Air Marshal Jitendra Mishra took over the command of the Western Air Command of the Indian Air Force.

A is incorrect: Air Marshal Vikram Singh is not the appointee cited.

B is incorrect: Air Marshal Balakrishnan Manikantan is not the one.

D is incorrect: Air Marshal Surat Singh is not the appointee.

💡 The Western Air Command is one of the IAF's key operational commands.
Q.No 34 Current AffairsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
"इुंडो-पैसिफिक महासागर पहल" की एक पहल है।
A
भारत
✓ Correct
B
मेडागास्कर
C
केन्या
D
मालदीव

Solution

Correct answer: A. The 'Indo-Pacific Oceans Initiative' (IPOI) is an initiative of India.

B is incorrect: It is not Madagascar's initiative.

C is incorrect: It is not Kenya's initiative.

D is incorrect: It is not Maldives' initiative.

💡 The IPOI was announced by PM Modi in 2019 to promote a safe, secure Indo-Pacific.
Q.No 27 Current AffairsHindi
फरवरी 2025 में, ने बच्चों और युवाओं में बढ़ती इंटरनेट और प्रौद्योगिकी की लत से निपटने के लिए भारत का पहला सेंटर फॉर एडवांस्ड रिसर्च ऑन एडिक्टिव बिहेवियर (सी.ए.आर.-ए.बी.) शुरू करने की घोषणा की है।
A
एम्स गुवाहाटी
B
एम्स राजकोट
C
एम्स, दिल्‍ली
✓ Correct
D
एम्स, पटना

Solution

Correct answer: C. In February 2025, AIIMS Delhi announced India's first Centre for Advanced Research on Addictive Behaviour (CAR-AB) for internet/technology addiction.

A is incorrect: AIIMS Guwahati was not the institute.

B is incorrect: AIIMS Rajkot was not the one.

D is incorrect: AIIMS Patna was not the institute.

💡 Internet and gaming addiction among youth is a growing public-health concern.
Q.No 38 Current AffairsHindi
जी-20 के संदर्भ में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा कथन सही है? ।. इसका शिखर सम्मेलन प्रतिवर्ष आयोजित होता है। |. भारत ने इसकी स्थापना के बाद किसी भी शिखर सम्मेलन की मेजबानी नहीं की है।
A
Only I
✓ Correct
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: A. For the G-20, only statement I is correct - its summit is held annually; statement II is false because India hosted the G-20 Summit in 2023. So 'Only I'.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' is wrong since India did host a summit.

C is incorrect: 'Both' is wrong because II is false.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong because I is true.

💡 India hosted the G-20 Leaders' Summit in New Delhi in September 2023.
Q.No 25 Current AffairsHindi
जून 2025 में तेलंगाना के किस विधायक ने राज्य नेतृत्व से असंतोष का हवाला देते हुए इस्तीफा दे दिया था?
A
बंदी संजय
B
टी. राजा सिंह
✓ Correct
C
किशन रेड्डी
D
एटेला राजेंद्र

Solution

Correct answer: B. In June 2025, Telangana MLA T. Raja Singh resigned, citing dissatisfaction with the state leadership.

A is incorrect: Bandi Sanjay did not resign here.

C is incorrect: Kishan Reddy is a Union Minister.

D is incorrect: Etela Rajender is not the one who resigned in this instance.

💡 MLAs are members of a state Legislative Assembly.
Q.No 26 Current AffairsHindi
सितंबर 2024 में तमिलनाडु के उपमुख्यमंत्री के रूप में किसे नियुक्त किया गया था?
A
उदयनिधि स्टालिन
✓ Correct
B
के. पलानीस्वामी
C
ओ. पन्नीरसेल्वम
D
वी. सेंथिल बालाजी

Solution

Correct answer: A. In September 2024, Udhayanidhi Stalin was appointed Deputy Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu.

B is incorrect: K. Palaniswami is the AIADMK leader/opposition.

C is incorrect: O. Panneerselvam is not the Deputy CM here.

D is incorrect: V. Senthil Balaji is a minister, not the Deputy CM.

💡 Udhayanidhi Stalin is the son of Tamil Nadu CM M.K. Stalin.
Q.No 28 Current AffairsHindi
पर्यावरण, वन एवं जलवायु परिवर्तन मंत्रालय ने में इको-मार्क नियमों को अधिसूचित किया है।
A
January 2024
B
September 2024
✓ Correct
C
January 2025
D
September 2025

Solution

Correct answer: B. The Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change notified the Eco-mark Rules in September 2024.

A is incorrect: It was not January 2024.

C is incorrect: It was not January 2025.

D is incorrect: It was not September 2025.

💡 The Eco-mark scheme labels environment-friendly consumer products.
Q.No 25 Current AffairsHindi
अप्रैल 2025 में, केरल के 50वें मुख्य सचिव के रूप में किसे नियुक्त किया गया है?
A
ए. जयतिलक
✓ Correct
B
शैलेश सी. मेहता
C
एस. महेंद्र देव
D
सुदर्शन वेणु

Solution

Correct answer: A. In April 2025, A. Jayathilak was appointed the 50th Chief Secretary of Kerala.

B is incorrect: Sarada Muraleedharan/others are not the appointee cited here.

C is incorrect: S. Mahendra Dev is an economist, not the Kerala Chief Secretary.

D is incorrect: Sudarshan Venu is a corporate executive.

💡 The Chief Secretary is the senior-most civil servant and administrative head of a state.
Q.No 26 Current AffairsHindi
मई 2025 में, उत्तरी सेना कमान के कमांडर-इन-चीफ के रूप में किसे नियुक्त किया गया है?
A
लेफ्टिनेंट जनरल धीरज सेठ
B
लेफ्टिनेंट जनरल प्रतीक शर्मा
✓ Correct
C
लेफ्टिनेंट जनरल अनिंद्य सेनगुप्ता
D
लेफ्टिनेंट जनरल राम चंद्र तिवारी

Solution

Correct answer: B. In May 2025, Lieutenant General Pratik Sharma was appointed Commander-in-Chief of the Northern Army Command.

A is incorrect: Lt Gen Dhiraj Seth is not the appointee here.

C is incorrect: Lt Gen Anindya Sengupta is not the one.

D is incorrect: Lt Gen Ram Chandra Tiwari is not the appointee.

💡 The Northern Command oversees the sensitive borders in Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh.
Q.No 22 Current AffairsHindi
सितंबर 2024 में, राष्ट्रीय अपराध रिकॉर्ड ब्यूरो का प्रमुख किसे नियुक्त किया गया है?
A
रजनीत कोहली
B
आलोक रंजन
✓ Correct
C
अंबुज चंदना
D
ज्ञानेश कुमार

Solution

Correct answer: B. In September 2024, Alok Ranjan was appointed the head (Director) of the National Crime Records Bureau (NCRB).

A is incorrect: Rajnit Kohli is not the appointee.

C is incorrect: Ambuj Chandna is not the NCRB head.

D is incorrect: Gyanesh Kumar is associated with the Election Commission.

💡 The NCRB compiles and publishes crime statistics in India.
Q.No 23 Current AffairsHindi
मई 2025 में, भारत के किस प्रसिद्ध परमाणु वैज्ञानिक का निधन हो गया था?
A
डॉ. होमी भाभा
B
डॉ. ए.पी.जे. अब्दुल कलाम
C
डॉ. एम.आर. श्रीनिवासन
✓ Correct
D
डॉ. राजा रमन्ना

Solution

Correct answer: C. In May 2025, the eminent Indian nuclear scientist Dr M.R. Srinivasan passed away.

A is incorrect: Dr Homi Bhabha died in 1966.

B is incorrect: Dr A.P.J. Abdul Kalam died in 2015.

D is incorrect: Dr Raja Ramanna died in 2004.

💡 Dr M.R. Srinivasan played a key role in developing India's nuclear power programme.
Q.No 34 Current AffairsEnglish
नवंबर 2024 तक, भारत में सभी पी.डी.एस. लाभार्थियों में से ने अपना ई.के.वाई.सी. पूरा कर लिया है।
A
88%
B
42%
C
100%
D
64%
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. As of November 2024, about 64% of all PDS beneficiaries in India had completed their e-KYC.

A is incorrect: 88% overstates the figure.

B is incorrect: 42% understates it.

C is incorrect: 100% had not yet completed e-KYC.

💡 e-KYC helps remove duplicate/ineligible ration cards from the Public Distribution System.
Q.No 36 Current AffairsHindi
केंद्र सरकार द्वारा संचालित स्कूलों के लिए नई नीति के अनुसार, कक्षा 5 और 8 में वार्षिक परीक्षा में अनुत्तीर्ण होने वाले छात्रों को क्या सहायता दी जाती है?
A
दूसरे स्कूल में स्थानांतरण
B
भविष्य की परीक्षाओं से छूट
C
अतिरिक्त कोचिंग और पुन: परीक्षा का अवसर
✓ Correct
D
अगली कक्षा में सीधे पदोन्नति

Solution

Correct answer: C. Under the new policy, students who fail the year-end exam in Classes 5 and 8 are given additional coaching and a chance to re-appear (re-examination).

A is incorrect: They are not transferred to another school.

B is incorrect: They are not exempted from future exams.

D is incorrect: They are not directly promoted to the next class.

💡 This reverses the earlier automatic 'no-detention' promotion up to Class 8.
Q.No 40 Current AffairsHindi
दक्षिणी एशिया क्षेत्र में, कौन सा देश ग्लोबल जेंडर गैप इंडेक्स 2025 में शीर्ष पर है?
A
बांग्लादेश
✓ Correct
B
भूटान
C
नेपाल
D
मालदीव

Solution

Correct answer: A. In South Asia, Bangladesh topped the Global Gender Gap Index 2025.

B is incorrect: Bhutan did not top the region.

C is incorrect: Nepal did not top it.

D is incorrect: Maldives did not top the regional ranking.

💡 The Global Gender Gap Index is published by the World Economic Forum.
Q.No 28 Current AffairsHindi
कौन सा मंत्रालय जुलाई 2025 में महिला आरोग्यम कक्ष के उद्घाटन से संबंधित है?
A
स्वास्थ्य एवं परिवार कल्याण मंत्रालय
B
महिला एवं बाल विकास मंत्रालय
C
विधि एवं न्याय मंत्रालय
✓ Correct
D
गृह मंत्रालय

Solution

Correct answer: C. The Ministry of Law and Justice was associated with the inauguration of the 'Mahila Aarogyam Kaksh' in July 2025.

A is incorrect: It was not the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare.

B is incorrect: It was not the Ministry of Women and Child Development.

D is incorrect: It was not the Ministry of Home Affairs.

💡 Women-focused facilities aim to improve access to services for women.
Q.No 30 Current AffairsEnglish
ग्लोबल जेंडर गैप इंडेक्स 2025 के अनुसार, भारत का प्रदर्शन स्कोर 2024 में 64.% से बढ़कर 2025 में हो गया है।
A
64.4%
✓ Correct
B
69.2%
C
66.4%
D
67.1%

Solution

Correct answer: A. As per the Global Gender Gap Index 2025, India's score was about 64.1% in 2024, and the 2025 figure cited is about 64.4%.

B is incorrect: 69.2% is too high.

C is incorrect: 66.4% is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 67.1% is not the figure.

💡 The Gender Gap Index measures gender parity in economics, education, health and politics.
